series_metadata.series_title: 8 and 36 Hour Underground Storage Tank Installer Course Proposals
series_metadata.series_description: Files contain course proposals and correspondence related to the approval of the 8 hour Underground Storage Tank (UST)Installer Continuing Education courses and 36 hour initial UST Installer Training Proposals.
